category_sources: Official Yubico developers page says the package contains a library and command line tool used to personalize YubiKeys.
source_facts.description says it is a YubiKey personalization library and tool.
display_name_sources: Official Yubico developers page heading is yubikey-personalization.
docs_sources: Official Yubico developers page documents yubikey-personalization and notes its library and command-line tool purpose.
Official Yubico manual page documents ykpersonalize syntax and options.
repo_sources: Official Yubico developers page gives git clone https://github.com/Yubico/yubikey-personalization.git and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: Official Yubico developers page says the package personalizes YubiKeys.
source_facts.description identifies YubiKey personalization library and tool.
source_facts.executables lists ykchalresp, ykinfo, and ykpersonalize.
